Class Character

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Abstract.Card
it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
it.polimi.Abstract.Character
Direct Known Subclasses:
Artist, Builder, Gatherer, Hunter, Inventor, Shaman
public abstract class Character extends Tribe
Base class for all character cards. Characters are a subset of Tribe cards that can be owned by players and provide various abilities or bonuses.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Character(Era era, int players, Position position, CharacterType type)
    Creates a character card for the given era, player count, position, and type.

  • Constructor Details

    • Character

      public Character(Era era, int players, Position position, CharacterType type)
      Creates a character card for the given era, player count, position, and type.
      Parameters:
      era - The era this character belongs to.
      players - The player count threshold.
      position - The initial board position.
      type - The character's type.

  • Method Details

    • getPlayers

      public int getPlayers()
      Returns the minimum number of players required for this character.
      Returns:
      The required player count.

    • getType

      public CharacterType getType()
      Returns the specific character type.
      Returns:
      The CharacterType enum value.

    • getPrestigePoints

      public int getPrestigePoints()
      Returns the prestige points associated with this character. Default is 0; subclasses can override to provide specific scoring logic.
      Returns:
      The prestige points value.

    • isEvent

      public boolean isEvent()
      Characters are never events.
      Specified by:
      isEvent in class Tribe
      Returns:
      Always false.

    • assignToPlayer

      public void assignToPlayer(Player player)
      Assigns this character card to the given player.
      Specified by:
      assignToPlayer in class Tribe
      Parameters:
      player - The player who acquired the character.
